name: DJConnect iOS 3.1.53
body:
# DJConnect App 3.1.53

## Ask DJ

- Added compatibility with DJConnect 3.1.98 technical track analysis provider
  status metadata.
- Provider diagnostics are treated as metadata only; the normal analysis UI
  still uses sections, timeline, and DJ tips from Home Assistant.

---

Platform: iOS

Unsigned CI artifacts are intended for diagnostics and internal validation.
Unsigned iOS binaries are published here for diagnostics and internal validation. For normal iOS distribution, use TestFlight/App Store.
